description:
You are an education policy analyst for the California Department of Education. Perform a design-based analysis to compare school performance and understand the impact of sampling design using the apistrat and apiclus1 datasets from the R survey package. Write your analysis code in /home/ga/RProjects/api_analysis.R and save the following deliverables to /home/ga/RProjects/output/:

1. api_survey_estimates.csv: Compute the survey-weighted mean API score (api00) by school type (stype) for both designs. For the stratified design (apistrat), use stratification by stype, weights pw, and fpc fpc. For the cluster design (apiclus1), use clustering by dnum, weights pw, and fpc fpc. Include columns: design, school_type, mean_api00, se, ci_lower, and ci_upper.
2. api_design_effects.csv: Compute the design effect (deff) for the overall mean api00 for both designs. Include columns: design, estimate, se, and deff.
3. api_regression.csv: Fit a survey-weighted linear regression model of api00 on meals, ell, and mobility using the stratified design. Include columns: term, estimate, std_error, and p_value.
4. api_survey_analysis.png: Create a multi-panel visualization showing the estimates and design comparisons.
